title: area frame
text: area frame A development object that can be used to group, separate, or decorate the contents of a form or report component. Related Links frame A layout object in a form or report that groups information on the component to improve readability, or provides specific functionality, such as inserting a page break in print output. form An interactive component that enables users to view, create, and modify data in a Windows or character-based application. report A Uniface presentation component that defines the content and layout of printed output of a Uniface application. It can be run locally or remotely, but it cannot be displayed on screen, or update the database. break frame An optional frame in reports, that is activated by the printbreak ProcScript statement. It is used to show temporary variable information, such as the current date, page number, and so on. line frame A horizontal or vertical line painted on a component, equivalent to an area frame that has a depth or width of zero, drawn through the middle of a character cell. named area frame An area frame that defines logical unit in a form or report component. It can be used to format data, or add and protect text. Was this topic helpful? Like Dislike
